patches.reason: CryptPad: fix harfbuzz build for WASM

trimmed: Fb2File: removed from linker deps (not built for WASM)
OFDFile: removed from linker deps (not built for WASM)
Dockerfile fb2file/log-symbols stages: broken references, not on build→output dependency chain
locateFilePatch: Replaced document.currentScript.getAttribute('src') with Module.locateFile=function(path,prefix){return prefix+path} in x2t.js pre-js

notes.buildToolsVersionMismatch: build_tools v8.3.0.91 was used by CryptPad, but core is v9.3.0.140. Artifact is bit-identical despite this mismatch.
notes.nativeRef: Native x2t reference is 8.3.3, WASM is 9.3. Version difference is expected (CryptPad backported 9.3 WASM support to older build_tools).
